Class MockEnergyService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockEnergyService
All Implemented Interfaces:
EnergyService
public final class MockEnergyService extends Object implements EnergyService
Mock Energy Service providing day and week energy consumption data.

Implements EnergyService to provide test/demo data without a database backend.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static MockEnergyService getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of the mock energy service.
      Returns:
      singleton MockEnergyService instance

    • resetForTesting

      public static void resetForTesting()
      Resets the singleton instance for test isolation.

    • getSnapshot

      public MockEnergyService.EnergySnapshot getSnapshot(MockEnergyService.AggregationPeriod period)
      Returns snapshot of energy consumption data.
      Parameters:
      period - the aggregation period for consumption data
      Returns:
      energy snapshot with consumption metrics

    • getDailyByDevice

      public Map<String,Double> getDailyByDevice(LocalDate date)
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns estimated energy consumption per device for a given day.

      Devices with no activity during the period are included with 0 Wh.

      Specified by:
      getDailyByDevice in interface EnergyService
      Parameters:
      date - the calendar date to query (00:00 to 23:59:59)
      Returns:
      map of device name to consumption in Wh; never null, may be empty

    • getWeeklyByDevice

      public Map<String,Double> getWeeklyByDevice(int isoWeekOfYear, int year)
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns estimated energy consumption per device for a given ISO week.

      Devices with no activity during the period are included with 0 Wh.

      Specified by:
      getWeeklyByDevice in interface EnergyService
      Parameters:
      isoWeekOfYear - the ISO week number (1-53)
      year - the year
      Returns:
      map of device name to consumption in Wh; never null, may be empty

    • getDailyByRoom

      public Map<String,Double> getDailyByRoom(LocalDate date)
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns estimated energy consumption per room for a given day.

      Room consumption is the sum of all devices in that room. Rooms with no devices or all devices having zero consumption are included with 0 Wh.

      Specified by:
      getDailyByRoom in interface EnergyService
      Parameters:
      date - the calendar date to query (00:00 to 23:59:59)
      Returns:
      map of room name to consumption in Wh; never null, may be empty

    • getWeeklyByRoom

      public Map<String,Double> getWeeklyByRoom(int isoWeekOfYear, int year)
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns estimated energy consumption per room for a given ISO week.

      Room consumption is the sum of all devices in that room. Rooms with no devices or all devices having zero consumption are included with 0 Wh.

      Specified by:
      getWeeklyByRoom in interface EnergyService
      Parameters:
      isoWeekOfYear - the ISO week number (1-53)
      year - the year
      Returns:
      map of room name to consumption in Wh; never null, may be empty

    • getHouseholdDaily

      public double getHouseholdDaily(LocalDate date)
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns total estimated energy consumption for the household on a given day.

      Household consumption is the sum of all rooms, which equals the sum of all devices.

      Specified by:
      getHouseholdDaily in interface EnergyService
      Parameters:
      date - the calendar date to query (00:00 to 23:59:59)
      Returns:
      total consumption in Wh; never negative

    • getHouseholdWeekly

      public double getHouseholdWeekly(int isoWeekOfYear, int year)
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns total estimated energy consumption for the household for a given ISO week.

      Household consumption is the sum of all rooms, which equals the sum of all devices.

      Specified by:
      getHouseholdWeekly in interface EnergyService
      Parameters:
      isoWeekOfYear - the ISO week number (1-53)
      year - the year
      Returns:
      total consumption in Wh; never negative

    • getDeviceNominalPower

      public int getDeviceNominalPower(String deviceType)
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns the nominal power consumption for a device type.

      This is the baseline power in watts used for energy calculations.

      Specified by:
      getDeviceNominalPower in interface EnergyService
      Parameters:
      deviceType - device type identifier (e.g. "SWITCH", "THERMOSTAT", "LIGHT")
      Returns:
      nominal power in watts; 0 if device type unknown

    • getAllDeviceTypes

      public Set<String> getAllDeviceTypes()
      Description copied from interface: EnergyService
      Returns all known device types with defined nominal power values.
      Specified by:
      getAllDeviceTypes in interface EnergyService
      Returns:
      set of device type identifiers; never null
